name: ascendant-realms
description: A tiny, expandable RTS/RPG hybrid prototype built with Phaser 3, TypeScript, and Vite.

scripts.godot:hybrid-mixed-combat:benchmark:head: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/godot/runGodotHybridMixedCombatReadabilityStressBenchmarkWindows.ps1
scripts.assets:refresh: npm run assets:process-battle-sprites && npm run assets:manifest && npm run assets:validate
